args.code: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector('button[data-testid=dns-record-add-button]') || [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('Add')); return btn ? {tag: btn.tagName, text: btn.textContent.trim().substring(0,50), found: true} : {found: false, buttons: [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].slice(0,10).map(b => b.textContent ? b.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) : 'empty')}; })()
